Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) Form.Caption = ' Arracoamento' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWArracoamentoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWArracoamentoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf ArrAloLin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible ArrAloUniProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible ArrAloLotNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible ArrAloLotCic.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible ArrDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible ArrHor.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible ArrProCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible ArrQtdRac.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Arracoamento.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ArrCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Arracoamento.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, ArrCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWArracoamentoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Arracoamento.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(ArrCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoLotes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWLotes.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAlojamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWAlojamento.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMortalidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWMortalidade.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBiometria' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWBiometria.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoQualidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWQualidade.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrAloLin", '', !'Linha', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrAloUniProNom", '', !'Tanque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrAloLotNro", '', !'Lote', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrAloLotCic", '', !'Ciclo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrDta", '', !'Data', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrHor", '', !'Hora', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrProCod", '', !'Produto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ArrQtdRac", '', !'Ração', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWArracoamentoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ArrAloUniProNom1.Visible = False &ArrAloLotNro1.Visible = False &ArrAloLotCic1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' &ArrAloLotNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' &ArrAloLotCic1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ArrAloUniProNom2.Visible = False &ArrAloLotNro2.Visible = False &ArrAloLotCic2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' &ArrAloLotNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' &ArrAloLotCic2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ArrAloUniProNom3.Visible = False &ArrAloLotNro3.Visible = False &ArrAloLotCic3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' &ArrAloLotNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' &ArrAloLotCic3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersArrDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"ARRFILCOD" &ArrFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' &ArrAloUniProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' &ArrAloLotNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' &ArrAloLotCic1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRDTA' &ArrDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &ArrDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"ARRFILCOD", "", not &ArrFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ArrFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &ArrAloUniProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloUniProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' AND not &ArrAloLotNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' AND not &ArrAloLotCic1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotCic1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'ARRDTA' AND not (&ArrDta1.IsEmpty() AND &ArrDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ArrDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &ArrAloUniProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloUniProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' AND not &ArrAloLotNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' AND not &ArrAloLotCic2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotCic2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'ARRDTA' AND not (&ArrDta2.IsEmpty() AND &ArrDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ArrDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &ArrAloUniProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloUniProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOLOTNRO' AND not &ArrAloLotNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRALOLOTCIC' AND not &ArrAloLotCic3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrAloLotCic3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'ARRDTA' AND not (&ArrDta3.IsEmpty() AND &ArrDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ArrDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ArrDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Arracoamento" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
